title: Messaging Outcomes, Delivery Claims, and Evidence · Type Forensics
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective messaging outcome, delivery claim, and evidence charter; preserve message identity and timing, locate the first broken ownership boundary, and retain a deterministic regression case. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in messaging outcome, delivery claim, and evidence charter and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: Define producer, consumer, operator, security, accessibility, latency, loss, duplicate, and recovery evidence for one messaging outcome.
Distinguish commands, events, notifications, documents, and queries by ownership, audience, expected handling, and change semantics.
State at-most-once, at-least-once, effectively-once effect, ordering, and durability claims without promising impossible end-to-end exactly-once delivery.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Evidence Contract
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug messaging team handles case 2634 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to separate local publish, broker ownership, and observable stakeholder effect; retain a screen-reader-readable delivery and ownership trace; then raise a broker resource alarm and stop new publisher admission. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Define producer, consumer, operator, security, accessibility, latency, loss, duplicate, and recovery evidence for one messaging outcome.

Inspect the Outcome Evidence Contract trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Evidence Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for define producer, consumer, operator, security, accessibility, latency, loss, duplicate, and recovery evidence for one messaging outcome. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Evidence Contract, keep Outcome Evidence Contract connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Transfer Evidence Plan
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-TypeScript function headed "// Evidence: rabbit-ts-transfer-evidence-plan-37d57l" that uses case 7823 to separate local publish, broker ownership, and observable stakeholder effect. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import amqplib or Node built-ins, open sockets, contact RabbitMQ, Docker, networks, databases, or external effects, read host state, or use credentials; verify those boundaries later with the named Node 24, amqplib 2.0.1, RabbitMQ 4.3, TLS, partition, restart, load, upgrade, and production transfer gates.
